Buffer Review: Social Media Scheduling for Busy Solopreneurs

Managing social media as a solopreneur can consume your entire day if you let it. Buffer brings sanity back by letting you batch, schedule, and analyze your social presence from one simple interface.

The Social Media Time Trap

Without a scheduler, your social media probably looks like:

  • Daily scramble to post something
  • Log into 4+ platforms
  • Create content in real-time
  • Post at random times
  • Hope someone sees it

This approach costs:

  • 30-60 minutes daily
  • Inconsistent presence
  • No analytics to improve
  • Burnout risk

Buffer changes everything.

What Buffer Does

1. Multi-Platform Scheduling

Connect:

  • Twitter/X
  • LinkedIn
  • Instagram
  • Facebook
  • Pinterest
  • TikTok
  • Google Business Profile
  • YouTube Shorts
  • Mastodon

Schedule to all from one place.

2. Content Calendar

Visual overview:

  • Drag and drop posts
  • See gaps in schedule
  • Bulk upload content
  • Color-coded by platform

3. Analytics

Track performance:

  • Engagement rates
  • Reach and impressions
  • Follower growth
  • Best posting times
  • Top posts

4. AI Assistant

New feature—AI helps:

  • Generate post ideas
  • Rephrase content
  • Suggest hashtags
  • Create variations

5. Link in Bio

Create a landing page:

  • Mobile-optimized
  • Customizable
  • Track clicks
  • Free feature

Pricing Tiers

Plan Channels Posts Price
Free 3 10/channel $0
Essentials 10 Unlimited $6/mo
Team 10 Unlimited $12/mo
Agency 20 Unlimited $120/mo

Best Value: Essentials at $6/month—unlimited scheduling

The Queue System Explained

Buffer's unique approach: the queue.

Instead of scheduling each post individually:

  1. Set posting times for each day
  2. Add content to queue
  3. Buffer fills slots automatically

Example Schedule:

  • Monday: 9am, 1pm, 5pm
  • Tuesday: 10am, 2pm
  • Wednesday: 9am, 1pm, 5pm

Your Action: Add 10 posts to queue
Result: Buffer schedules 10 posts across your time slots automatically

Change schedule anytime—posts redistribute.

Buffer for Different Platforms

Twitter/X

Full support:

  • Threads (multi-tweet posts)
  • Image posts
  • Video posts
  • Polls (manual post)

LinkedIn

  • Personal profile posts
  • Company pages
  • Text + image/video
  • Articles (native LinkedIn)

Instagram

  • Feed posts
  • Stories
  • Reels
  • Carousels

Note: Instagram requires mobile app for final posting (notification-based)

Facebook

  • Page posts
  • Images and videos
  • Reels

TikTok

  • Schedule video posts
  • Bulk upload drafts

Pinterest

  • Pin scheduling
  • Board selection
  • Rich pins

Real Workflow for Solopreneurs

Monday Morning (1 hour)

  1. Open Buffer
  2. Review last week's analytics
  3. Identify top-performing content
  4. Create and queue 10-15 posts
  5. Balance platforms

Daily (5 minutes)

  • Check engagement
  • Respond to comments
  • Re-share evergreen content

Monthly (1 hour)

  • Download analytics report
  • Assess strategy
  • Plan content themes
  • Update queue schedule

Weekly time saved: 3-4 hours

Analytics That Matter

Engagement Rate

Percentage of audience engaging:

  • Good: 1-3%
  • Excellent: 3-5%
  • Exceptional: 5%+

Track per platform.

Best Times to Post

Buffer analyzes when your audience is active.

Use this data to:

  • Update posting schedule
  • Prioritize platforms
  • Test different times

Top Posts

See what resonates:

  • Content type (image, video, text)
  • Topics that perform
  • Posting times that work

Create more of what works.

Buffer vs. Alternatives

Feature Buffer Hootsuite Later Sprout
Price (Solo) $6 $99 $25 $249
Ease of Use Excellent Good Good Complex
Free Plan Yes No Yes No
AI Features Yes Yes Yes Yes
Analytics Good Excellent Good Excellent
Team Collab Good Excellent Limited Excellent

Verdict: Best balance of price, simplicity, and features for solopreneurs.

The AI Assistant

Buffer's AI helps create:

  • Post variations: One idea → 5 posts
  • Hashtag suggestions: Relevant and trending
  • Rephrasing: Fresh takes on old content
  • Idea generation: Never stuck for content

Link in Bio Feature

Create your "linktree" alternative:

  • Single page for all links
  • Custom colors and branding
  • Track which links get clicks
  • Connect to your URL

Free forever—no additional cost.

Limitations to Know

Instagram Quirks

  • Requires mobile notification
  • Can't auto-publish stories
  • Carousel scheduling limited

No Social Listening

Can't monitor:

  • Brand mentions
  • Industry keywords
  • Competitor activity

Use Mention or Google Alerts alongside.

Platform Limits

Some features vary by platform. TikTok scheduling is available but may require additional steps.

Integration Ecosystem

Works with:

  • Canva: Design and schedule in one flow
  • Feedly: Share RSS content
  • Pocket: Queue saved articles
  • Zapier: Connect to 500+ apps

Setup Guide

Day 1

  • Create Buffer account
  • Connect 3 primary channels
  • Set up posting schedule

Week 1

  • Queue 10-20 posts
  • Test the workflow
  • Check analytics baseline

Week 2

  • Refine schedule based on engagement
  • Add remaining platforms
  • Use AI assistant

Month 1

  • Identify top content themes
  • Establish batching routine
  • Upgrade if needed

Tips for Maximum ROI

1. Batch Creation

One session per week:

  • Create all content
  • Queue everything
  • Forget until next week

2. Repurpose Content

One idea → Multiple posts:

  • Blog post → Twitter thread + LinkedIn article
  • Quote graphic → Instagram + Pinterest
  • Tip → Twitter + LinkedIn

3. Use Analytics

Monthly review:

  • Which content performed?
  • Which times worked?
  • Which platforms need more?

4. Mix Content Types

Balance:

  • Value posts (60%)
  • Engagement posts (20%)
  • Promotional posts (20%)

Getting Started

  1. Sign up for free Buffer account
  2. Connect your top 3 platforms
  3. Set up your posting schedule
  4. Add 10 posts to queue
  5. Wait, watch, learn

Upgrade to Essentials when:

  • Need more than 3 channels
  • Want unlimited scheduling
  • Ready for fuller analytics

Final Verdict

Rating: 4.4/5

Buffer is the best social media scheduling tool for solopreneurs because:

  • Price: $6/month is unbeatable
  • Simplicity: Learn in 10 minutes
  • AI Features: Keep improving content
  • Analytics: Good enough for optimization
  • Link in Bio: Bonus value

The main limitations:

  • Instagram requires workarounds
  • No social listening
  • Growing business may need more

Recommendation: Start with the free plan. If you're actively posting on 3+ platforms, upgrade to Essentials within the first month. The unlimited scheduling and expanded analytics are worth the small investment.

Disclosure: We independently review tools. Some links may be affiliate links that support our work at no extra cost to you.
